title: delosperma aereum var. album
intro: Delosperma aereum var. album, also known as the white daisy chain, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Aizoaceae. It is a succulent, perennial plant that is native to South Africa, known for its small white flowers and narrow, thread-like leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and it has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, burns, and digestive problems. Delosperma aereum var. album can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or as a topical cream or salve, to harness its medicinal benefits.
